# BakeX

> Bake your hardened, CIS/STIG-benchmarked golden image from a YAML blueprint on any cloud (or locally via KVM) and export compliance evidence as PDF or SARIF.

## Quickstart

```bash
git clone https://github.com/invicton/bakex.git
cd bakex
docker compose up -d
```

Blueprints are scriptable without the UI — useful for agents:

```bash
bakex validate blueprints/ubuntu/22.04/cis-l1-aws.yaml   # schema-check; exit 0/1; --json for structured output
bakex build    blueprints/ubuntu/22.04/cis-l1-aws.yaml   # build the golden image (also accepts a bundled profile name)
```

## Key files

- [README](README.md) — Main landing page and setup guide.
- [docs/getting-started.md](docs/getting-started.md) — Walkthrough tutorial for first-run AL2023 image building.
- [docs/blueprint-guide.md](docs/blueprint-guide.md) — Reference for YAML blueprint schema and rules.
- [docs/configuration.md](docs/configuration.md) — Guide to environment variables, system dependencies, and LLM backends.
- [docs/api.md](docs/api.md) — REST API endpoint reference and CLI exit codes.
